about.pageSubtitle: In the heart of Istanbul, turning dreams into reality for 15 years.
about.story1: Odhun Organization was founded in Istanbul in 2009 with a small team. This journey, started by our founding partner Aylin Öztürk with the belief that 'everyone deserves their dream event,' has today become one of Istanbul's most trusted event management companies.
about.story2: Over the years, we've witnessed hundreds of weddings and thousands of special moments. We've grown while maintaining the same excitement, dedication, and excellence standards at every event.
about.story3: Today, with our team of 10 experts, we organize all kinds of events from weddings to corporate events, birthdays to circumcisions in Istanbul and surrounding provinces.
about.ctaSubtitle: Contact us today to start planning your event.

passion.title: Passion
passion.desc: We approach every event as if it were our own special day, planning every detail with care.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.desc: With over 15 years of experience, we continuously raise our standards to deliver the best service.

trust.title: Trust
trust.desc: We build lasting relationships with our clients through transparent and honest communication.

punctuality.title: Punctuality
punctuality.desc: Adhering to schedules and deadlines is the cornerstone of our professionalism.

testimonials.pageSubtitle: Our clients describe us best. Experiences from over 500 happy couples and families.
testimonials.ctaSubtitle: Let's plan the event of your dreams together and join our happy clients.

contact.pageSubtitle: Reach out for your questions. We guarantee a same-day response.
contact.infoText: You can contact us through any channel for information about your event or to request a quote. Our expert team will respond as soon as possible.
contact.quickTipText: For urgent questions, message us on WhatsApp — we usually respond within 30 minutes.

quote.pageSubtitle: Fill in the form and our experts will prepare a budget-friendly quote for you the same day.
quote.name: Full Name
quote.messagePlaceholder: Tell us about your event and share your expectations...
quote.successText: Our team will get back to you as soon as possible, usually the same day.
quote.talkSubtext: Don't want to wait for the form?

cta.subtitle: Contact us today to plan the best event that fits your budget and dreams. Same-day response guarantee.

footer.description: We turn your dream events into reality. Over 15 years of experience by your side.
